name: lazyeat
desc: Lazyeat（懒人手势）｜手势隔空控制，比划就行！Lazyeat is a touch-free controller for use while eating! Don't want greasy hands while watching shows or browsing the web during meal…
descFull: Lazyeat（懒人手势）｜手势隔空控制，比划就行！Lazyeat is a touch-free controller for use while eating! Don't want greasy hands while watching shows or browsing the web during meals? You can pause videos/full screen/switch videos just by gesturing to the camera!
